title: Intense Roasted Peruvian Chicken Aji De Gallina
description: This Peruvian dish features roasted chicken in a rich and creamy cheese sauce, flavored with pomegranate molasses and aji amarillo peppers, all in one pot. It is a no-onion-no-garlic-friendly recipe, making it accessible to a wide range of tastes.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the chicken thighs with salt and black pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Sear the chicken thighs until browned on all sides, then remove from the pot.
Add the chopped aji amarillo peppers to the pot and cook until fragrant.
Add the pomegranate molasses to the pot and stir to combine.
Return the chicken to the pot and pour in the heavy cream.
Cover the pot with a lid and transfer to the preheated oven.
Roast for 30 minutes, then remove the lid and top with shredded cheese.
Continue roasting until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let rest for a few minutes before serving.
